# UI TripleD

> Production-ready UI components, blocks, and full pages available in shadcn/ui and Base UI, powered by Framer Motion. Copy-paste components — not an installable npm package.

**Last Updated:** 2026-04-14T15:39:21.142Z

- Components come in **shadcn/ui**, **Base UI**, and **Carbon** variants (the suffix in the name indicates the style system, e.g. `-shadcnui`, `-baseui`, `-carbon`)
- **Copy-paste model** — browse the docs, preview a component, then copy its code directly into your project
- Built with **React 19**, **Next.js 16**, **TypeScript**, **Tailwind CSS 4**, and **Framer Motion**
- Also offers a **Landing Builder** (drag & drop shadcn/ui blocks into landing pages), **Background Builder** (shader & Aurora backgrounds), and **Grid Generator** (Tailwind CSS grids)

## Docs

- [Component Gallery](https://ui.tripled.work/components): Browse all components, blocks, and pages with live previews
- [GitHub Repository](https://github.com/moumen-soliman/uitripled): Source code, issues, and discussions
- [Contributing Guide](https://github.com/moumen-soliman/uitripled/blob/main/CONTRIBUTING.md): How to contribute to UI TripleD

## Table of Contents

- Components (161 items)
- Blocks (74 items)
- Pages (23 items)
- UI Elements (20 items)

## Components

- [Accessible Image Slider Card](https://ui.tripled.work/md/image-slider-card-shadcnui.md): Image carousel card with keyboard support, reduced motion handling, and screen reader-friendly labels
- [Animated Card Stack](https://ui.tripled.work/md/animated-card-stack-baseui.md): Stacked cards that expand on hover (Base UI)
- [Animated Card Stack](https://ui.tripled.work/md/animated-card-stack-shadcnui.md): Stacked cards that expand on hover
- [Cards Slider](https://ui.tripled.work/md/cards-slider-shadcnui.md): Liquid smooth draggable cards slider with shadcn/ui styling and framer-motion animations
- [Cinema Ticket](https://ui.tripled.work/md/cinema-ticket-baseui.md): Cinematic theater ticket with rip effect and barcode (Base UI)
- [Cinema Ticket](https://ui.tripled.work/md/cinema-ticket-shadcnui.md): Cinematic theater ticket with rip effect and barcode
- [Conference Ticket](https://ui.tripled.work/md/conference-ticket-baseui.md): Animated conference ticket with glassmorphism effects and holographic details (Base UI)
- [Conference Ticket](https://ui.tripled.work/md/conference-ticket-shadcnui.md): Animated conference ticket with glassmorphism effects and holographic details
- [Credit Card](https://ui.tripled.work/md/credit-card-baseui.md): 3D animated credit card with flip animation to show CVV (Base UI)
- [Credit Card](https://ui.tripled.work/md/credit-card-shadcnui.md): 3D animated credit card with flip animation to show CVV
- [Detail Task Card](https://ui.tripled.work/md/detail-task-card-baseui.md): Task management detail panel with animated assignee chips and editor controls (Base UI)
- [Detail Task Card](https://ui.tripled.work/md/detail-task-card-shadcnui.md): Task management detail panel with animated assignee chips and editor controls
- [Ecommerce Highlight Card](https://ui.tripled.work/md/ecommerce-highlight-card-baseui.md): Product spotlight card with blurred border, bundle selector, and fulfillment details (Base UI)
- [Ecommerce Highlight Card](https://ui.tripled.work/md/ecommerce-highlight-card-shadcnui.md): Product spotlight card with blurred border, bundle selector, and fulfillment details
- [Glass Blog Card](https://ui.tripled.work/md/glass-blog-card-baseui.md): Glassmorphism blog card with image zoom, author info, and read action (Base UI)
- [Glass Blog Card](https://ui.tripled.work/md/glass-blog-card-shadcnui.md): Glassmorphism blog card with image zoom, author info, and read action
- [Glass Checkout Card](https://ui.tripled.work/md/glass-checkout-card-baseui.md): Glassmorphism checkout card with payment method selector and input fields (Base UI)
- [Glass Checkout Card](https://ui.tripled.work/md/glass-checkout-card-shadcnui.md): Glassmorphism checkout card with payment method selector and input fields
- [Glass Order Summary](https://ui.tripled.work/md/glass-order-summary-baseui.md): Glassmorphism order summary card with item list and checkout button (Base UI)
- [Glass Order Summary](https://ui.tripled.work/md/glass-order-summary-shadcnui.md): Glassmorphism order summary card with item list and checkout button
- [Glass Wallet Card](https://ui.tripled.work/md/glass-wallet-card-baseui.md): Glassmorphism crypto wallet card with balance, trend, and action buttons (Base UI)
- [Glass Wallet Card](https://ui.tripled.work/md/glass-wallet-card-shadcnui.md): Glassmorphism crypto wallet card with balance, trend, and action buttons
- [Hover Expand Card](https://ui.tripled.work/md/hover-expand-card-baseui.md): Card that lifts and expands on hover (Base UI)
- [Hover Expand Card](https://ui.tripled.work/md/hover-expand-card-shadcnui.md): Card that lifts and expands on hover
- [Native User Card](https://ui.tripled.work/md/native-user-card-baseui.md): Compact user profile card with avatar, name, handle, and action button with spring animations (Base UI)
- [Native User Card](https://ui.tripled.work/md/native-user-card-shadcnui.md): Compact user profile card with avatar, name, handle, and action button with spring animations
- [Project Card](https://ui.tripled.work/md/project-card-baseui.md): Glassmorphism project card with links, tags, and hover effects (Base UI)
- [Project Card](https://ui.tripled.work/md/project-card-shadcnui.md): Glassmorphism project card with links, tags, and hover effects
- [Theater Ticket](https://ui.tripled.work/md/theater-ticket-baseui.md): Cinematic theater ticket with rip effect and barcode (Base UI)
- [Theater Ticket](https://ui.tripled.work/md/theater-ticket-shadcnui.md): Cinematic theater ticket with rip effect and barcode

### Components

#### Chat

- [AI Chat Interface](https://ui.tripled.work/md/ai-chat-interface-shadcnui.md): Chat input with attachments, model selector, and accessible controls
- [Chat App](https://ui.tripled.work/md/chat-app-shadcnui.md): Fully functional chat interface with animated messages
- [Floating Chat Widget](https://ui.tripled.work/md/floating-chat-widget-shadcnui.md): Floating chat widget with AI agent selection dropdown and animations
- [Messenger](https://ui.tripled.work/md/messenger-shadcnui.md): Glassmorphism messenger workspace with accessible motion and quick replies

- [AI Loading Skeleton](https://ui.tripled.work/md/ai-loading-skeleton-shadcnui.md): Loading state with diagonal shimmer gradient and opacity wave
- [AI Response Typing Stream](https://ui.tripled.work/md/ai-response-typing-shadcnui.md): Character-by-character typing animation with natural pauses and thinking states
- [Animated Accordion](https://ui.tripled.work/md/animated-accordion-shadcnui.md): Accordion with smooth expand/collapse and rotate arrow
- [Animated Navbar](https://ui.tripled.work/md/animated-navbar-shadcnui.md): Navigation bar with animated underline indicator
- [Animated Pagination](https://ui.tripled.work/md/animated-pagination-shadcnui.md): Pagination with smooth page transition indicator
- [Animated Profile Menu](https://ui.tripled.work/md/animated-profile-menu-shadcnui.md): Floating profile avatar that reveals quick action cards with smooth motion
- [Animated Sidebar](https://ui.tripled.work/md/animated-sidebar-shadcnui.md): Sidebar with slide-in animation and overlay
- [Animated Tooltip](https://ui.tripled.work/md/animated-tooltip-shadcnui.md): Tooltip with delay and slide animation
- [Avatar Group](https://ui.tripled.work/md/avatar-group-shadcnui.md): Stacked avatar group with hover reveal and tooltips
- [Blog Typography](https://ui.tripled.work/md/blog-typography-shadcnui.md): Beautiful blog post typography with text, links, images, blockquotes, and code examples
- [Browse Folder](https://ui.tripled.work/md/browse-folder-baseui.md): Folder browser with animated tabs and content (Base UI)
- [Browse Folder](https://ui.tripled.work/md/browse-folder-shadcnui.md): Folder browser with animated tabs and content
- [Command Palette](https://ui.tripled.work/md/command-palette-shadcnui.md): Command palette with search and keyboard navigation
- [Comment Thread](https://ui.tripled.work/md/comment-thread-shadcnui.md): Nested comment thread with rich interactions and animations
- [Context Menu](https://ui.tripled.work/md/context-menu-shadcnui.md): Right-click context menu with nested items animation
- [Context Menu Bubble](https://ui.tripled.work/md/context-menu-bubble-shadcnui.md): Right-click reveals circular expanding radial menu with icons
- [Course Content Page](https://ui.tripled.work/md/course-content-page-shadcnui.md): Interactive course page with video player, instructor details, curriculum sections, and progress tracking
- [Currency Converter Card](https://ui.tripled.work/md/currency-converter-card-baseui.md): Finance conversion widget with animated inputs, simulated exchange updates, and contextual feedback (Base UI)
- [Currency Converter Card](https://ui.tripled.work/md/currency-converter-card-shadcnui.md): Finance conversion widget with animated inputs, simulated exchange updates, and contextual feedback
- [Drag-to-Confirm Slider](https://ui.tripled.work/md/drag-to-confirm-slider-shadcnui.md): Slider that activates action only when fully dragged to end
- [Expanding Search Dock](https://ui.tripled.work/md/expanding-search-dock-shadcnui.md): Minimal search icon that expands into full input with blur
- [Glassmorphism Statistics Card](https://ui.tripled.work/md/glassmorphism-statistics-card-baseui.md): Interactive statistics card with hover reveal and smooth transitions (Base UI)
- [Glassmorphism Statistics Card](https://ui.tripled.work/md/glassmorphism-statistics-card-shadcnui.md): Interactive statistics card with hover reveal and smooth transitions
- [Interactive Timeline](https://ui.tripled.work/md/interactive-timeline-shadcnui.md): Vertical timeline where elements animate and connect with lines on scroll
- [Mac Searchbar](https://ui.tripled.work/md/mac-searchbar-shadcnui.md): Mac-style searchbar with animated dropdown, glassmorphism effects, and smooth transitions
- [Magnetic Avatar Group](https://ui.tripled.work/md/magnetic-avatar-group-shadcnui.md): Stacked avatars that spread apart on hover showing tooltips
- [Multiple Accounts Switcher](https://ui.tripled.work/md/multiple-accounts-shadcnui.md): Glassmorphic account switcher with animated dropdown and accessible listbox controls
- [News Feed](https://ui.tripled.work/md/news-feed-shadcnui.md): Interactive news feed with categories, search, and animated cards
- [Projects Block](https://ui.tripled.work/md/projects-block-baseui.md): Animated project card with hover effects, image zoom, and link buttons (Base UI)
- [Projects Block](https://ui.tripled.work/md/projects-block-shadcnui.md): Animated project card with hover effects, image zoom, and link buttons
- [Smart Hover Card](https://ui.tripled.work/md/smart-hover-card-shadcnui.md): Card that detects cursor direction and reveals content from that side
- [Stacked Card Carousel](https://ui.tripled.work/md/stacked-card-carousel-shadcnui.md): Three stacked cards that shift and tilt dynamically on hover
- [Synced Lyric Captions](https://ui.tripled.work/md/synced-lyric-captions-shadcnui.md): Bottom-to-top timed captions with play/pause controls and optional audio sync for songs or voiceovers.
- [Volume Component](https://ui.tripled.work/md/volume-component-shadcnui.md): A smooth, draggable volume slider component with framer-motion animations and shadcn styling.
- [Weather Dashboard](https://ui.tripled.work/md/weather-dashboard-shadcnui.md): Immersive weather dashboard with hourly charting, weekly outlook, and live air-quality alerts
- [Web Performance Page](https://ui.tripled.work/md/web-performance-page-shadcnui.md): Real-time analysis of web vitals and performance metrics

#### Dropdown

- [Staggered Dropdown](https://ui.tripled.work/md/staggered-dropdown-shadcnui.md): Dropdown menu with staggered item animations

#### Forms

- [Animated Checkbox](https://ui.tripled.work/md/animated-checkbox-shadcnui.md): Checkbox with checkmark animation
- [Animated Radio](https://ui.tripled.work/md/animated-radio-shadcnui.md): Radio button group with selection ripple
- [Animated Select](https://ui.tripled.work/md/animated-select-shadcnui.md): Select dropdown with smooth open/close animation
- [Glass Account Settings Card](https://ui.tripled.work/md/glass-account-settings-card-shadcnui.md): Account management card with subscription overview and billing actions in glassmorphic style
- [Glass Forgot Password Card](https://ui.tripled.work/md/glass-forgot-password-card-shadcnui.md): Reset-password screen with glassmorphic styling and status messaging
- [Glass Profile Settings Card](https://ui.tripled.work/md/glass-profile-settings-card-shadcnui.md): Glassmorphic profile settings form with avatar upload, bio, and notification preferences
- [Glass Sign-In Card](https://ui.tripled.work/md/glass-sign-in-card-shadcnui.md): Glassmorphic sign-in panel with social auth buttons and email form
- [Glass Sign-Up Card](https://ui.tripled.work/md/glass-sign-up-card-shadcnui.md): Glassmorphic sign-up flow with social providers, email fields, and terms checkbox
- [Glass Verification Code Card](https://ui.tripled.work/md/glass-verification-code-card-shadcnui.md): Verification code entry with glassmorphic inputs, status messaging, and reduced-motion support
- [Simple Calendar](https://ui.tripled.work/md/simple-calendar-shadcnui.md): Calendar picker with date selection animation

#### Inputs

- [AI Glow Input](https://ui.tripled.work/md/ai-glow-input-shadcnui.md): Input field with dynamic glow that pulses based on typing speed - smart motion feedback
- [Floating Label Input](https://ui.tripled.work/md/floating-label-input-shadcnui.md): Input with animated floating label
- [Password Input](https://ui.tripled.work/md/password-input-shadcnui.md): Password input with toggle visibility and strength indicator

#### Lists

- [Animated List](https://ui.tripled.work/md/animated-list-shadcnui.md): List with staggered item animations
- [Draggable List](https://ui.tripled.work/md/draggable-list-shadcnui.md): Reorderable list with drag and drop spring physics

#### Modal

- [Animated Dialog](https://ui.tripled.work/md/animated-dialog-shadcnui.md): Modal dialog with backdrop fade and spring animation
- [Fade & Slide Modal](https://ui.tripled.work/md/fade-slide-modal-shadcnui.md): Modal with fade backdrop and slide-up animation
- [Fluid Modal Transition](https://ui.tripled.work/md/fluid-modal-transition-shadcnui.md): Modal that expands smoothly from clicked trigger element using layoutId

#### Notifications

- [Notification Center](https://ui.tripled.work/md/notification-center-shadcnui.md): Multi-variant notification stack with accessible announcements, actions, and motion states

#### Tabs

- [Animated Tabs](https://ui.tripled.work/md/animated-tabs-shadcnui.md): Tabs with sliding indicator animation

- [Wizard Form](https://ui.tripled.work/md/wizard-form-shadcnui.md): Multi-step wizard form with animated transitions, validation, and progress tracking

- [Bottom Modal](https://ui.tripled.work/md/bottom-modal.md): Cute bottom-centered modal with smooth slide-up animation and glassmorphism design
- [Folder Animation](https://ui.tripled.work/md/folder-animation-carbon.md): Animated folder card with motion blur effect, perfect for showcasing file operations or loading states.
- [Native Avatar Expand](https://ui.tripled.work/md/native-avatar-expand-baseui.md): Avatar component that expands to reveal the name on click with smooth animations. (Base UI)
- [Native Avatar Expand](https://ui.tripled.work/md/native-avatar-expand-shadcnui.md): Avatar component that expands to reveal the name on click with smooth animations.

- [Social Login Button](https://ui.tripled.work/md/social-login-button-shadcnui.md): A set of animated social login buttons for major platforms (Github, Google, X, etc.) with various effects.

- [Minimal Resume](https://ui.tripled.work/md/minimal-resume-shadcnui.md): Vercel-inspired minimal resume with clean typography and grid layout

- [Professional Resume](https://ui.tripled.work/md/professional-resume-shadcnui.md): Clean, formal resume template suitable for corporate applications

- [Standard Resume](https://ui.tripled.work/md/standard-resume-shadcnui.md): A standard, professional resume layout with a sidebar, suitable for most industries.

## Blocks

- [About Us](https://ui.tripled.work/md/about-us-section-baseui.md): About us section with value cards, icons, and animated reveal effects (Base UI)
- [About Us](https://ui.tripled.work/md/about-us-section-shadcnui.md): About us section with value cards, icons, and animated reveal effects
- [Bento Grid Block](https://ui.tripled.work/md/bento-grid-block-baseui.md): Layered bento grid with imagery, metrics, and smooth motion reveals (Base UI)
- [Bento Grid Block](https://ui.tripled.work/md/bento-grid-block-shadcnui.md): Layered bento grid with imagery, metrics, and smooth motion reveals
- [Blog Block](https://ui.tripled.work/md/blog-block-baseui.md): Animated blog posts grid with staggered cards, date/time indicators, and hover effects (Base UI)
- [Blog Block](https://ui.tripled.work/md/blog-block-shadcnui.md): Animated blog posts grid with staggered cards, date/time indicators, and hover effects
- [Contact Block](https://ui.tripled.work/md/contact-block-baseui.md): Contact form with animated contact info cards, working hours, and interactive icons (Base UI)
- [Contact Block](https://ui.tripled.work/md/contact-block-shadcnui.md): Contact form with animated contact info cards, working hours, and interactive icons

- [Contact Form](https://ui.tripled.work/md/contact-form-section-shadcnui.md): Contact form section with animated inputs, validation, and form handling

## Pages

### Page

#### About

- [About Us Page](https://ui.tripled.work/md/about-us-page-shadcnui.md): Glassmorphism about page showcasing mission, values, and leadership with motion accents.

- [Auto-Revealing Heading](https://ui.tripled.work/md/auto-revealing-heading-shadcnui.md): Heading that reveals each letter/word with staggered motion on scroll
- [CTA Banner Section](https://ui.tripled.work/md/cta-banner-section-baseui.md): Animated call-to-action banner with gradient background and button animations (Base UI)
- [CTA Banner Section](https://ui.tripled.work/md/cta-banner-section-shadcnui.md): Animated call-to-action banner with gradient background and button animations
- [Dynamic Spotlight CTA](https://ui.tripled.work/md/dynamic-spotlight-cta-shadcnui.md): Floating spotlight follows cursor to reveal gradient CTA text with premium effects
- [FAQ Section](https://ui.tripled.work/md/faq-section-baseui.md): Animated FAQ section with expandable questions and smooth transitions (Base UI)
- [FAQ Section](https://ui.tripled.work/md/faq-section-shadcnui.md): Animated FAQ section with expandable questions and smooth transitions
- [Feature Grid Section](https://ui.tripled.work/md/feature-grid-section-baseui.md): Animated feature grid with staggered card animations and icon reveals (Base UI)
- [Feature Grid Section](https://ui.tripled.work/md/feature-grid-section-shadcnui.md): Animated feature grid with staggered card animations and icon reveals
- [Pricing Section](https://ui.tripled.work/md/pricing-section-baseui.md): Animated pricing cards with hover effects and feature lists (Base UI)
- [Pricing Section](https://ui.tripled.work/md/pricing-section-shadcnui.md): Animated pricing cards with hover effects and feature lists
- [Profile Page](https://ui.tripled.work/md/profile-page-shadcnui.md): User profile with gradient cover, stats, and posts feed
- [Scroll Progress Tracker](https://ui.tripled.work/md/scroll-progress-tracker-shadcnui.md): Fixed progress bar that follows scroll and glows on section changes
- [Scroll Reveal](https://ui.tripled.work/md/scroll-reveal-baseui.md): Section that animates into view on scroll with intersection observer (Base UI)
- [Scroll Reveal](https://ui.tripled.work/md/scroll-reveal-shadcnui.md): Section that animates into view on scroll with intersection observer
- [Stats Section](https://ui.tripled.work/md/stats-section-baseui.md): Animated statistics section with cards and counters (Base UI)
- [Stats Section](https://ui.tripled.work/md/stats-section-shadcnui.md): Animated statistics section with cards and counters
- [Testimonial Section](https://ui.tripled.work/md/testimonial-section-baseui.md): Carousel-style testimonial section with smooth transitions (Base UI)
- [Testimonial Section](https://ui.tripled.work/md/testimonial-section-shadcnui.md): Carousel-style testimonial section with smooth transitions

#### Hero

- [Hero Section](https://ui.tripled.work/md/hero-section-baseui.md): Hero section with staggered text and button reveal (Base UI)
- [Hero Section](https://ui.tripled.work/md/hero-section-shadcnui.md): Hero section with staggered text and button reveal
- [Staggered Text Hero](https://ui.tripled.work/md/staggered-hero-shadcnui.md): Hero section with staggered text reveal

#### Notifications

- [Toast Notification](https://ui.tripled.work/md/toast-notification-shadcnui.md): Animated toast notification popup

## UI Elements

### Data

#### Charts

- [Accessible Cash Flow Chart](https://ui.tripled.work/md/cash-flow-chart.md): Interactive cash flow bar chart with keyboard focus, tooltips, and screen reader support

#### Progress

- [Animated Progress Bar](https://ui.tripled.work/md/animated-progress-shadcnui.md): Progress bar with smooth animation

### Decorative

#### Background

- [Floating Gradient](https://ui.tripled.work/md/floating-gradient-shadcnui.md): Animated floating gradient background effect
- [Gradient Animation](https://ui.tripled.work/md/gradient-animation-shadcnui.md): Smoothly transitioning gradient background
- [Reactive Background Grid](https://ui.tripled.work/md/reactive-background-grid-shadcnui.md): Background pattern that reacts to mouse movement and click ripples

- [Animated Quote Block](https://ui.tripled.work/md/animated-quote-block-shadcnui.md): Quote that types itself in, pauses, then subtly breathes
- [Dynamic Tag Cloud](https://ui.tripled.work/md/dynamic-tag-cloud-shadcnui.md): Floating cluster of tags that drift and rearrange when hovered
- [Floating Info Panel](https://ui.tripled.work/md/floating-info-panel-shadcnui.md): Info tooltip that drifts up/down while fading in/out intermittently
- [Folder Animation](https://ui.tripled.work/md/folder-animation.md): Animated folder card with motion blur effect, perfect for showcasing file operations or loading states
- [Holographic Wall](https://ui.tripled.work/md/holographic-wall-shadcnui.md): Black wall with Pharaonic hieroglyphs and golden cursor light reflection
- [Liquid Cursor](https://ui.tripled.work/md/liquid-cursor-shadcnui.md): A liquid-like cursor effect that mixes colors on movement
- [Spotlight Section](https://ui.tripled.work/md/spotlight-section-shadcnui.md): Container where mouse creates soft radial spotlight following cursor

### Micro

#### Buttons

- [Ripple Click Effect](https://ui.tripled.work/md/ripple-click-button-shadcnui.md): Material design inspired ripple effect on click
- [Scale Hover Button](https://ui.tripled.work/md/scale-hover-button-shadcnui.md): A button that scales up smoothly on hover
- [Shimmer Button](https://ui.tripled.work/md/shimmer-button-shadcnui.md): Button with continuous shimmer effect

- [AI Unlock Animation](https://ui.tripled.work/md/ai-unlock-animation-shadcnui.md): Premium unlock animation with particles, ripples, and loading states
- [Mood Gradient Button](https://ui.tripled.work/md/mood-gradient-button-shadcnui.md): Button with background gradient that shifts based on hover angle

#### Icons

- [Heart Favorite](https://ui.tripled.work/md/heart-favorite-shadcnui.md): Animated heart icon for like/favorite actions

#### Links

- [Preview Details Card](https://ui.tripled.work/md/preview-details-card-shadcnui.md): Link card that reveals a smooth detail preview box on hover

#### Toggles

- [Elastic Toggle Switch](https://ui.tripled.work/md/elastic-switch-shadcnui.md): Toggle switch with elastic spring animation

## Optional

- [Framer Motion Docs](https://www.framer.com/motion/): Animation library used by all components
- [shadcn/ui Docs](https://ui.shadcn.com/docs): Component primitives that shadcn variants build on
- [Base UI Docs](https://base-ui.com/): Headless component primitives that Base UI variants build on
- [Tailwind CSS v4 Docs](https://tailwindcss.com/docs): Utility-first CSS framework used for styling
